items.name_en: M46653 This OnTheGo tote bag combines Giant Monogram and Monogram Reverse canvas, reinterpreting the spacious East West silhouette. A removable circular coin purse adds detail, while the Toron top handle and removable wide shoulder strap offer versatile carrying options.
items.name_cn:
M46653 This OnTheGo tote bag combines Giant Monogram and Monogram Reverse canvas, reinterpreting the spacious East West silhouette. A removable circular coin purse adds detail, while the Toron top handle and removable wide shoulder strap offer versatile carrying options.
Detailed features: 25.0 x 13.0 x 10.0 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: [Chip Version] Model M46203 CarryAll Small Handbag, crafted from Monogram canvas with leather trim, creating a perfect companion for city life. Features a spacious layout with a neat interior and a large interior pocket for added functionality. The Monogram canvas clutch is secured with a leather strap. Dimensions: 29 x 24 x 12 cm

items.name_en: [Chip Version] Model M46197 Introducing the new CarryAll medium handbag, featuring a Monogram canvas and leather trim for a flattering silhouette. Equipped with a zip pocket for ample storage, a detachable zip pouch for added functionality, and an adjustable handle length.

items.name_en: 🍒M 🍒 5BMIU MI New Chain Bag, top-grade imported lambskin, brand classic signature Matelasse embroidery. items.name_en: 🍒M 🍒 5BB172: Miu Miu new size briefcase, made of top-grade imported calfskin, smooth and delicate texture, cotton satin lining. This bag is cool, capturing a sophisticated multi-functional design that blends menswear and womenswear elements, casual and lazy, natural and free-spirited, full of personality. Oversized capacity yet lightweight, minimalist yet not simple. The new size offers better fit. Major fashion bloggers almost all have one. Size: 29X17X9cm (with original packaging)

items.name_en: M24575 Blue, M24120 Pink, M24563 Yellow, Original Leather, Dynamic Code Change. This Capucines Mini Bag features Taurillon leather and lustrous metal hardware, with a petite Capucines Cutie decoration crafted from the same materials and design, secured to the strap with a Monogram flower hook. A playful design that effortlessly brightens any look. 21.0 x 14.0 x 8.0 cm (L x H x W)

items.name_en: M12088 Large Bella Bucket Bag from the Flight Mode collection. This piece features classic perforated leather rendered with a seasonal gradient effect, while the lining continues the fresh tones of the body. A removable coin pouch ensures tidy storage, making it a modern choice that transcends the winter season.

items.name_en: Code Chip
items.name_cn:
Code Chip
Custom imported top-grain cowhide, steel buckle hardware
This small CarryAll bag features Monogram Empreinte embossed leather, with a secure closure, refined interior, and a removable zip pocket, offering a comfortable choice for daily outings. The adjustable shoulder strap allows for effortless switching between hand, shoulder, and crossbody carry.
